---
title: "07e_extended_comparison"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(here)

final_model_comparison <- read_csv(
  here("outputs", "tables", "final_model_comparison.csv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

late_integration_summary <- read_csv(
  here("outputs", "tables", "late_integration_summary.csv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

sensitivity_results <- read_csv(
  here("outputs", "tables", "sensitivity_analysis_results.csv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

extended_report_table <- final_model_comparison %>%
  select(data_source, model, auc, ROC, Sens, Spec)

print(extended_report_table)

write_csv(
  extended_report_table,
  here("outputs", "tables", "extended_report_table.csv")
)
```
